title: CAD Gallery Discovery
description: Machine-readable discovery document published at gallery/.well-known/cad-gallery.json

version.description: Schema version of this discovery document

generator.description: Name of the tool that generated this document

generator_version.description: Version/ref of the generator (e.g. git tag or 'dev')

git_source_url.description: HTTPS URL of the source code repository

profile.description: Maker profile from maker.yaml (omitted if not present)

url.description: Base URL of the gallery (e.g. https://user.github.io/repo)

feed_rss.description: Absolute URL to the RSS feed

feed_atom.description: Absolute URL to the Atom feed

model_count.description: Total number of models in the gallery

last_updated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last build

models.description: List of all models in the gallery

url.description: Absolute URL to the detail page

stl_url.description: Absolute URL to download the STL file

fcstd_url.description: Absolute URL to download the FCStd source file (null if unavailable)

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of last file modification
